privileged_info_summary: Verified that the main dataset is a real forensic image ('DFTT #7 NTFS Undelete test image') downloaded from SourceForge. The `known_bad_hashset.txt` file is dynamically generated at runtime via `setup_task.sh` by extracting MD5 hashes of 4 randomly selected files from the `ntfs_undel.dd` image and appending 3 synthetic decoy hashes. All file paths and case naming conventions defined in the metadata (target case name 'Hash_Lookup_2024', case number 'INV-HASH-006', and output paths in /home/ga/Reports/) have been successfully validated against the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
